title: Real estate and management
body: Another website made with the CMS *[WordPress](http://www.xarop.com/tag/wordpress/).* Once the client's needs were captured, a design, layout and programming of a c*hild* [*theme*](http://www.xarop.com/tag/theme/) was carried out based on a *premium theme* prepared to show properties for rent and sale. Design [*responsive*](http://www.xarop.com/tag/responsive-design/), adapts from large desktop screens and *smartTV* to the small screens of *smartphones*, including *tablets*. [asesoriamartin.com](http://asesoriamartin.com/)
